message:
fix(tests): overhaul framer-motion mock and align tests with redesigned UI

Comprehensive test infrastructure update to match the recent UI redesign:

framer-motion mock (framer-motion.tsx):
- Add proper MockMotionValue interface with createMotionValue() and
  isMotionValue() helpers for type-safe mock values
- Use React.useState in useMotionValue/useAnimation hooks to return
  stable references, fixing unstable useEffect dependency warnings
- Filter MotionValue objects from style props before DOM rendering to
  prevent invalid DOM attribute errors

BasketSidebar.test.tsx:
- Update all assertions to match redesigned sidebar: "Your basket is
  empty" → "Empty Basket", button labels → "MD Files", "Skills ZIP",
  "Copy Install Command", "Clear All"
- Update visibility assertions: sidebar now removed from DOM via
  AnimatePresence instead of translate-x-full CSS class

PromptCard.test.tsx, PromptGrid.test.tsx:
- Adjust test selectors and assertions for redesigned card layout

Nav.tsx, SpotlightSearch.tsx, FeaturedPromptsSection.tsx:
- Minor adjustments for redesigned component API compatibility

PromptCard.tsx, PromptDetailModal.tsx:
- Small fixes aligning component behavior with new design system

vitest.setup.ts:
- Streamline test setup by moving mock logic into dedicated mock file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
